title: More Nonsense Limerick 68
content:
There was an old person of Hyde,
    Who walked by the shore with his bride,
    Till a Crab who came near 
    Fill'd their bosoms with fear,
    And they said, "Would we'd never left Hyde!"
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "More Nonsense Limerick 68"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
